response.overview: That saintly pervert Axel Braun proudly brings you The Bachelorette. A young conservative woman is about to be married but something happens just 24 hours before the big day. Suddenly she is caught in a whirlpool of events that bring out her repressed sexuality. The crescendo of lust makes her realize she still wants to play around. What she doesn't realize is the she might actually be the one who's been played. Once again, acclaimed director Axel Braun delivers a first-rate feature that will make you forget the standard rules of adult filmmaking, and the use of the fast forward button.
response.title: The Bachelorette
